title: Extra semicolons should be removed
description: Extra semicolons should be removedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEThis rule is deprecated, and will eventually be removed. Extra semicolons (;) are usually introduced by mistake, for example because:It was meant to be replaced by an actual statement, but this was forgotten. There was a typo which lead the semicolon to be doubled, i. e.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
